other_observers: Paul Neldner; We are the original finders.
specific_location: Lathrop State Park, by North Martin Lake Inlet
description: Approximately the same size as Ring-bill Gulls which were close by. Dark collar, large dark spot on face. Black, slightly thick down-curved bill.Behaviors: Bird was resting on the waterCall: None heardPlumage: Juvenile/1st winter
